agribalyse.name_en: Soup, Asian-style with noodles, prepacked, to be reheated
agribalyse.name_fr: Soupe asiatique, avec pâtes, préemballée à réchauffer

ingredients_text: instant-noodles 85,4% ( wheat  flour 54%, modified tapioca starch, palm oil, salt), seasoning 8,2% (salt, pepper powder, garlic powder, sugar, flavour, dried green onions, flavour enhancers (e621, e627, e631)), oil mixture 6% (palm oil, flavour), chili powder 0,4%
